name: Form
playroomSnippet:
<Form
            onSubmit={formData =>
                alert({title: "This is your data", message: JSON.stringify(formData, null, 2)})
            }
        >
            <Box padding={16}>
                <Stack space={16}>
                    <TextField name="name" label="Name" />
                    <EmailField
                        name="email"
                        label="e-mail"
                    />
                    <ButtonLayout primaryButton={<ButtonPrimary submit>Send</ButtonPrimary>} />
                </Stack>
            </Box>
        </Form>
